_comment_prompt: /pixellab-pip create 1-bit sidescroller tileset with black center with white outline, and sparse white top. after done, create a copy with gameboy 1 bit green colors.
_comment: PixelLab generated the tileset structure. The strict black/white and Game Boy green (#0F380F/#9BBC0F) copies were produced LOCALLY by Aseprite palette-clamping, not by PixelLab.

MCP create_sidescroller_tileset.lower_description: strict 1-bit monochrome platform tile center: solid black terrain body, black fill in the middle, crisp white single-pixel outer outline, no gray, no anti-aliasing, simple high-contrast bitmap shapes
MCP create_sidescroller_tileset.transition_description: sparse white pixels only along the top surface, minimal broken white dust or snow-like speckles, mostly black underneath, no gray, no anti-aliasing
